use actix_web::{web, App, HttpServer, HttpResponse};

async fn compute_handler(path: web::Path<u64>) -> HttpResponse {
    // GOOD: trivial arithmetic runs inline on the async runtime
    let id = path.into_inner();
    let result = id * 2 + 1;
    HttpResponse::Ok().body(result.to_string())
}

async fn heavy_handler(input: String) -> HttpResponse {
    // GOOD: reserve blocking pool for genuinely CPU-heavy work
    let hash = web::block(move || {
        expensive_scientific_computation(&input)
    })
    .await
    .unwrap();

    HttpResponse::Ok().body(hash.to_string())
}

fn expensive_scientific_computation(input: &str) -> String {
    // simulate heavy CPU work
    format!("computed_{}", input.len())
}
